e16c5fef9713.cf49187379dc: Flaat Studio designed a digital platform for Urbia Studio, an architecture studio needing an online presence to showcase their work visually and professionally, while expanding their reach to potential clients.
4e8ef52cee2a.0ab6e93e2b5e: Previously, the studio had to repeatedly send PDF files to each prospect — an inefficient method that didn't reflect professionalism. This website serves as an online portfolio accessible anytime, strengthening credibility with stakeholders.
70fc01870922.f5684a9039f1: Flaat Studio handled the entire process from design to launch. We collaborated intensively with the studio owner to ensure the resulting visual identity aligned with the character and values they wanted to convey.
caf84942045d.3ee48792585f: The design references the studio's established visual principles to maintain brand consistency. Navigation was kept minimal so visitors focus directly on the work without getting lost in complex menus.
c4b8a7413b49.d57edc53aa82: The site was built with technology ensuring optimal access speed, even when displaying high-quality images. An intuitive content management system enables the studio team to update the portfolio independently without technical assistance.
e19bc84d7fa0.f318537ab3d6: Translating custom designs with high precision was achieved through intensive communication with the client and efficient technical approaches. For interactive components like carousels, we chose stable, proven solutions to maintain light performance and smooth user experience.
134cf6ef9f7d.4f956316a8b4: The client is very satisfied, now having an online company profile easily presentable to potential clients. Key lesson: custom websites require attention to detail, but complex features can be solved wisely by leveraging stable components while still meeting design and user needs.
